titleStmt.title: SII 10.509: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 509. (A.R. No. 131 of 1917.) ON A BROKEN PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF GŌKARṆĒŚVARA, PENUMŪLI, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1236. (Ānanda)

summary.p: States that Eṟṟaya-Leṅka, the gate-keeper of Pratāpa-Rudradēva, remitted certain customs leviable on lands belonging to temples in 22 villages included in his nāyaṅkara and also certain dues on lands enjoyed by the mahājanas in the same villages. Kānika, gaḍḍuga, māḍa, puṭṭi-pahiṇḍi, puṭṭukalupu, upakṛiti, suṅkamu and grazing f� are among the dues remitted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti prajābhyāṁ (bhyaḥ) paripālayaṁ
ttē (ttāṁ) nyāyēna mā¨rggēṇa mahīta
lēśā gōbrāhmaṇēbhya śśubha mastu
nityaṁ lōkā ssamastā ssukhinō
bhavaṁttu . svasti śrīśubhaśakava
¨rṣaṁbulu 1236 Agu nēṁ
ṭṭi Ānaṁddasaṁvvatsara Āṣā
ḍha śu 6 gu . svasti śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍḍalēśvara kākatiyyapratāpa
rudradēvamahārājulu pri
thivi rājyamu sēyucunuṁ
ḍḍaṁgānu Ānagari śrīvākiṭi
Eṟṟayaleṁkaṁgāru tamanā
yaṁkaṟamu sthalamu penu
ṁbuluvu Uppalapāḍu maṁ
ccekalapūṁḍi jupūṁḍi
lapūṁḍi naṁdiveluvu kāṭya
varamu prāṁbaṟṟu telaprōlu
mallivelaṁṭūru pinapāḍu pi
narāvūru pulukaṁttamū
pūru pōtuṁbaṟṟu pūṁḍivāḍa
kōḍūru lāmu krōlukoṁḍḍa

krollikoṁḍḍa guṁḍḍimaḍa siṁga
ramu sahitamaina Iruva
yireṁḍḍūḷa dēvasthānāla vri
ttula kānika gaḍḍuga māḍa
lūnu Āyūḷavrittulu gala
mahājanālaku puṭṭipahiṁ
ḍḍini puṭṭikolupūnu Upa
kṛtini suṁkkamūnu pasula
pullarīni kānikalūnu sa
hita maina Avanāyālūnu
pinapāṭilōnu Ivinimi
tyamai doḍḍavōti peddiṁgāru
tiṟiteni dōṣaparihārā
¨rtthamugānu pratāparudradē
vamahārājulaku puṇyamu
gānu sa¨rvvamānyamugānu Ā
caṁdrā¨rkkamugānu dhāravōsi
penuṁbuluvu gaurīśvaraśrī

mahādēvara guḍimuṁddaṭa
nu śāsanagaṁbhamu pratiṣṭhi
ṁstimi Īmēraku Ōruṁgaṁṭṭi
svayaṁbhunādhadēvara sākṣi
svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
dattānupālināṁ paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vvā yō harēti vasuṁddharāṁ ṣa
ṣṭhi ¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyā
ṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Īdha¨rmmuvu go
niyāḍinavāri śrīpādālu pra
tiṣṭhiṁccinavāri sirassuna nu
nnavi Īdha¨rmmuvu ceṟiceda
nani talaṁcinavāṁḍu tana
peddakoḍukukapālānaṁ gu
ḍicinavāṁḍu gaṁgakaṟu
ta vēyikapilagōvulaṁ ja
ṁppinavāṁḍu

nivēśanālu ko
lacinagaḍa I
mūranu Enimi
dimūrala gaḍa

kṣētrālu kolaci
nagaḍa Īmūranu
Iruvainālugumū
ralu
Note.—A and B are continuations of the main inscription. To their proper left are given the actual lengths of the cubits in double line.
Digital edition of SII 10.509 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
